ogTitle: Petrie Terrace vs Pheasant Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Petrie Terrace and Pheasant Creek.
heading: Petrie Terrace vs Pheasant Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Petrie Terrace, Queensland and Pheasant Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pheasant Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Petrie Terrace (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Petrie Terrace or Pheasant Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Petrie Terrace has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Pheasant Creek scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Petrie Terrace scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Pheasant Creek scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Petrie Terrace or Pheasant Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pheasant Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
